files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,11 @@
 # macOS
 .DS_Store
+._*
 .AppleDouble
 .LSOverride
+.Spotlight-V100
+.Trashes
+Icon?
 
 # Node
 node_modules/
@@ -13,6 +17,14 @@ pnpm-debug.log*
 # Logs
 *.log
 
+# Editors
+.idea/
+.vscode/*
+!.vscode/extensions.json
+!.vscode/launch.json
+!.vscode/settings.json
+!.vscode/tasks.json
+
 # Builds / output
 dist/
 coverage/
@@ -24,10 +36,17 @@ coverage/
 .vitest/
 .nyc_output/
 .pnpm-store/
+.parcel-cache/
+.vite/
+.next/
+.nuxt/
+.svelte-kit/
 
 # Env
 .env
 .env.*
+!.env.example
+!.env.sample
 
 # Archives / binaries
 *.tgz
@@ -38,3 +57,15 @@ coverage/
 *.exe
 *.dll
 *.dylib
+*.so
+*.a
+*.o
+*.obj
+*.class
+*.jar
+*.wasm
+*.node
+*.dSYM/
+
+# oxlint*
+oxlint*

@@ -33,15 +33,20 @@
 		"typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit",
 		"format": "biome format --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts README.md",
 		"lint": "biome check src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts README.md",
+		"lint:oxlint": "pnpm exec -- oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json src tests",
+		"lint:oxlint:typeaware": "pnpm exec -- oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.json --config .oxlintrc.json src tests",
+		"lint:types": "pnpm lint:oxlint:typeaware && pnpm typecheck",
 		"lint:fix": "biome check --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts README.md",
 		"test": "vitest run",
 		"test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
-		"check": "pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage"
+		"check": "pnpm lint && pnpm lint:oxlint:typeaware && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage"
 	},
 	"devDependencies": {
 		"@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.10",
 		"@types/node": "^25.0.3",
 		"@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.16",
+		"oxlint": "^1.34.0",
+		"oxlint-tsgolint": "^0.9.2",
 		"typescript": "^5.9.3",
 		"vitest": "^4.0.16"
 	}

@@ -17,6 +17,12 @@ importers:
       '@vitest/coverage-v8':
         specifier: ^4.0.16
         version: 4.0.16(vitest@4.0.16(@types/node@25.0.3))
+      oxlint:
+        specifier: ^1.34.0
+        version: 1.34.0(oxlint-tsgolint@0.9.2)
+      oxlint-tsgolint:
+        specifier: ^0.9.2
+        version: 0.9.2
       typescript:
         specifier: ^5.9.3
         version: 5.9.3
